afterSnapshot.name: ROUTE_MAX_WAYPOINTS
afterSnapshot.description: Maximum number of user waypoints in a route (excludes the boat origin). Bounds the per-leg weather API calls.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Each leg destination triggers one weather fetch; cap waypoints to respect Open-Meteo rate limits.
implementation: 12 keeps the worst-case fetch count modest while allowing rich routes.
